name: claudelift
description: Read and export your Claude Cowork chats from Claude Desktop or Claude Code — list tasks, get transcripts, build continuation seed prompts, and list or create export bundles.

engine_path.title: ClaudeLift engine (cowork-export.exe)
engine_path.description: Path to the ClaudeLift export engine. Requires ClaudeLift installed. For a standard per-user install this is %LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\ClaudeLift\resources\engine\cowork-export\cowork-export.exe — the default below should already be correct.
